title: GreifPrevention Addon
description: GreifPrevention AntiClaim addon is a lightweight extension for GriefPrevention that prevents players from creating land claims too close to existing claims.
body:
**🆕 TenseClaims AntiClaim v1.0**

✨ Features

🔨 Wand Tool - Golden Axe for visual region selection

🖱️ Click-Based Selection - Left/right click for positions

💾 Auto-Save - Regions automatically saved to config.yml

🌍 Multi-World Support - Works in any world

🔐 Permission Control - Granular permission system

🚀 Production Ready - Fully tested and optimized

📦 Self-Contained - No external dependencies needed


**Supports ignoring:**

Admin claims

Same-owner claims

Clean integration with GriefPrevention API (no ghost claims)


**🎮 Commands**

/anticlaim wand

/anticlaim create <name>

/anticlaim info

/anticlaim reload


**🔒 Permissions**

anticlaim.wand - Use the wand tool

anticlaim.create - Create regions

anticlaim.reload - Reload config

anticlaim.bypass - Bypass all restrictions

anticlaim.use - General command use

🧹 **Fixes**

Fixed ghost claim protection issue

Removed GriefPrevention “Claim created!” message when claim is denied

Fixed encoding issues causing broken symbols in chat


**🚀 Performance**

Memory: Negligible usage

CPU: Minimal impact

Load Time: <1 second

Region Check: ~1ms per claim


🧩 **Compatibility**

Paper / Spigot 1.20+

Tested on 1.21.x

Requires GriefPrevention 16.18+
